roa.docketEntryComment: Non Opposition Motion - PEOPLE'S NON-OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET  ASIDE A PLEA OF GUILTY, & VACATE PRIOR JUDGEMENT AND CONVICTION [Short Form] ( Motion made under PC section 1473.7)
DEFT'S MOTION WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA; P & A FILED

/CAL  MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/DAWT/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF MARCH 23RD, 1994/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:02-23-1994/X: SENTENCE DATE:03-23-1994/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIALCONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA,/CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WAS ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 02-23-1994 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 03-23-1994 ARE HEREBY VACATED,/X: THERE BEINGNO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/BWR: 09-16-94/BWR1/X: THESE ARE AMENDED MINUTES AS OF 07-09-21/
FAW;ISS3YPROB;PJ9M;CTS22D;W/S;NOT;11590;DTC;RX;RF200%10;LF;PC;PSR;FNE500;ACCEPTS PROB;REL INS;NOT TO REENTER USA ILLEGALLY;REMANDED
CERTIFIED TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENTENCE
